title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| CORRIGENDUM for recruitment for the post of District Programme Officer (DPO) on purely contractual and temporarity basis under DM’s Office,West Tripura which was supposed to close on 12-02-2021 has been extended upto 20-02-2021. | 11/02/2021 | 21/02/2021 | |
| Notification for District Business Reforms Action Plan | Notification for list of online service more than 20 users per annum and less than 20 users per annum | 11/09/2020 | 31/12/2020 | |
| Show Cause notice againt Shri subhankar Das,LDC (fixed pay) under R.D Deptt. | Show Cause notice againt Shri subhankar Das,LDC (fixed pay) under R.D Deptt posted at Rural Development department, Government of Tripura,Agartala. | 25/11/2020 | 24/12/2020 | |
content:
